close_reason: Created examples/rust-deps/ demonstrating reindeer pattern for external crates. Full integration requires reindeer tool and third-party setup.
description:
Create examples/rust/hello-deps/ with an external crate dependency.

Files needed:
- examples/rust/hello-deps/main.rs - uses an external crate (e.g., serde, clap)
- examples/rust/hello-deps/BUCK - rust_binary with deps

Requires:
- Rust deps cell with the external crate
- Cargo.toml with the dependency

Should build with both `cargo build` and `buck2 build`.
title: Rust: hello with external crate (deps example)
